description_long: This is a medium-sized bottle with a smooth, gently tapered cylindrical body and a rounded shoulder leading to a narrow neck. The bottle is predominantly a matte brown color, with a metallic-looking brown cap and a silver band at the neck. The front of the bottle features the branding 'EKOS' and the word 'CASTANHA' in large, white, modern sans-serif letters, partially wrapping around the body. The cap appears to be a screw type, and the bottle's surface is clean and free of any visible damage or wear. The overall design suggests it is intended for personal care or cosmetic use, such as lotion or oil.
description: A brown, matte bottle with a metallic brown screw cap and silver neck band, featuring white branding text. The bottle is smooth, clean, and visually modern.
description_view_0: Front view showing 'EKOS' and the start of 'CASTANHA' in large white letters, with the metallic brown cap and silver neck band clearly visible.
description_view_1: Rotated view showing more of the word 'CASTANHA' and the continuation of the white branding text wrapping around the bottle.
description_view_2: Side view with the letters 'NHA' most prominent, showing the bottle's smooth, uninterrupted brown surface.
description_view_3: Rear view with only partial white letters visible at the edges, mostly showing the plain brown surface and the bottle's overall shape.
attribute_label_or_branding: White text 'EKOS' and 'CASTANHA' in large, modern sans-serif font, partially wrapping around the bottle's body.
